summary: This update makes MouseHunt Improved easier to browse, configure, and use. The settings screen now organizes modules into clearer sections, several popular options have better defaults, and new features like Gifts in Inbox and Journal Progress Log Tracker are now available. It also includes broad fixes, performance improvements, and polish across maps, journals, HUDs, inventory, marketplace tools, and more. Please take a quick look through settings after updating in case a new default is not your preference. Happy hunting!

details.title: New Features
items: Gifts in Inbox will let you easily claim recent gifts directly from your inbox
Journal Progress Log Tracker adds clear timing and history for progress log entries
Rank-Up Forecaster is now available as a beta module for previewing your progress toward the next rank

details.title: New Module Sections
items: The settings screen now groups modules by what they affect: Appearance, Hunting & Setup, Inventory & Economy, Location HUDs, Locations/Maps/Travel, Journal/Progress/Stats, Social & Profiles, Navigation & Utilities, Hide & Simplify, Beta & Experiments, and Advanced
These sections replace the older broad categories so related features are easier to find

details.title: Defaults and Settings
items: Several useful modules and settings are now enabled by default or promoted out of beta, including Better Journal loot display improvements, Better Tournaments localized times, Better Marketplace quick actions, Better Gifts gift selection, Better UI square profile pics, and Real Base Stats
The new Base Item Counters module is enabled by default to show toothlet and printing paper counts for supported bases
Advanced Settings now includes an "Update Game Data" link for refreshing bundled game data when needed
Custom preview pickers and several settings controls were cleaned up for a smoother configuration experience

details.title: Better Marketplace
items: Added beta feature for integrated Markethunt price charts to marketplace item views
Expanded marketplace browsing, pricing tools, quick actions, and item view polish
Improved sorting, filtering, and quick buy/sell workflows

details.title: Better Journal
items: Journal entries now support broader loot displays with more useful links and icons
Several journal-related options were updated and improved

details.title: Better Maps
items: Map groups, styling, and performance were updated
Added support for more map organization and cleaner map displays

details.title: Location HUDs - Floating Islands
items: Airship customization now has better preview, randomization, and workflow tools
The Floating Islands HUD received usability, style, and beta feature updates

details.title: Location HUDs - Fort Rox
items: Fort Rox timeline and trap setup tools were refined
Hunt tracking and related interactions should be clearer and easier to use

details.title: Location Dashboard
items: The dashboard now supports more locations
Reliability and refresh behavior were improved across supported dashboards

details.title: Better Inventory
items: Trap sorting, filtering, and inventory readability were reworked and improved

details.title: Better Quests
items: Quest objective mice are easier to inspect with improved links and hover details

details.title: Paste Hunter ID
items: Hunter lookup is more flexible and now handles full profile links more reliably

details.title: Image Upscaling & Transparency
items: Upscaled images now recover more reliably when the game rerenders them

details.title: General Improvements
items: Profile and scoreboard navigation, tooltip handling, number formatting, bundled assets, and overall UI polish all received fixes and improvements
This release also includes many smaller style fixes, bug fixes, and performance updates across the extension
